page.content: The table presents data from a kinase assay involving the compound JTP-74057 and its interaction with the substrate PD0325901, detailing various IC50 values in nanomolar (nM) concentrations. The first row, labeled MEK/ERK, shows an IC50 value of 290 nM for p-MEK1 and an IC50 value of 110 nM for ERK2. The second row, p-MEK2, has an IC50 value of 190 nM for ERK2 and 140 nM for its respective substrate. In the Raf/MEK/ERK category, the B-Raf/u-MEK1 yields IC50 values of 3.5 nM for ERK2 and 4.1 nM for its corresponding substrate. The B-Raf/u-MEK2 row indicates IC50 values of 5.3 nM for ERK2 and 3.6 nM for its substrate.

page.content: The c-Raf/u-MEK1 row reports IC50 values of 11 nM for ERK2 and 24 nM for the substrate, while the c-Raf/u-MEK2 row presents IC50 values of 7.9 nM for ERK2 and 6.0 nM for its substrate. Both the Raf/MBP and c-Raf rows show IC50 values greater than 10,000 nM for both B-Raf and MBP, indicating a lack of potency. Lastly, the Cell proliferation (HT-29) entry displays values of 0.57 and 3.4, respectively, summarizing the effects of JTP-74057 and PD0325901 on cell proliferation in the specified cell line.
